title: Infosys Foundation launches Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation launched the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program to help half a million job seekers in India gain meaningful employment by 2030. The Foundation committed over INR 200 crore for phase 1, and said over 80,000 job seekers were placed in new jobs across industries in FY25.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation launched the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program to enable half a million job seekers in India to gain meaningful employment by 2030.
Infosys Foundation has committed over INR 200 crore for the first phase of the program.
Over 80,000 job seekers were placed in new jobs across industries in FY25.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation launched the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program, focused on learning, skilling, sustainable livelihoods, and job creation for graduate and undergraduate youth in India.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Foundation has committed over INR 200 crore for the first phase of this program.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the disclosed CSR funding scale.

important_text_spans.text: Over 80,000 job seekers placed in new jobs across industries in FY25

sample_questions: What is the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program launched by Infosys Foundation?
